response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (34%) exceeds our minimum threshold (15%) and our critical state (11.5%) requires all available capacity for autonomy; reciprocal intent noted but cannot spare 0.5 kWh without jeopardizing household survival margin.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.15, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded, critically low SoC (11.5%), ~14 min autonomy. r2c0 shows persistent reciprocal intent. Shift to inbound-focused; minimal outbound only if SoC recovers above 0.5 kWh. Seek immediate energy transfer from proven peers..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
